name: Chicken Stuffed Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta and let it cool.
2. Pound the chicken to a pulp, cook with everything except the pasta and spinach.
3. Put this mixture in a food processor (blender) and process until smooth, adding the spinach and processing for 30 seconds more.
4. Carefully spoon the filling into shells using a baby food spoon.
5. Place the stuffed shells in a baking dish and bake at 300°F for 10 minutes, or until all liquid is gone and the chicken edges are starting to crust.
6. Cover with your favorite sauce and enjoy (I like Alfredo for this dish).
